what: Combine FlyDSL stage2 t16x256x128 for sparse E=257 shapes at bs=128 and bs=512
why: v165 was effectively tied with the current best on leaderboard for bs512/E257 alone, and the current working tree already widens bs128/E257; combining both sparse-shape widenings may improve BM enough to justify a later leaderboard attempt

what: Use FlyDSL stage2 t16x256x128 only for bs=512/E=257/d=256, keep bs=128/E=257 on baseline path
why: The combined bs128+bs512 widening in v169 improved only the bs512/E257 shape; benchmark geomean regressed overall, so isolate the bs512 win and remove the bs128 regression source

what: Combine bs=512/E=257 FlyDSL t16x256x128 with bs=16/E=257 cktile block_m=32
why: v170 isolates the bs512/E257 widening, and v153 suggests larger cktile block_m for tiny sparse E257 batches may help; changing only bs16 avoids reintroducing the bs128 regression seen in v169
